events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Nauru. Marshall Green, the first U.S. Ambassador to Nauru, presented credentials while based in Canberra.

evidence.quote: Marshall Green, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1974-02-28. Credentials presented: 1974-10-26. Left Canberra 1975-07-31.
